generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components (model extraction / simulation result collection)
instance SysMLModelSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Extracts SysML block definition and internal block diagrams representing requirements, functional, logical, and product layers"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SysMLModelDataTransmitted
]

instance MontiArcModelSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Extracts MontiArc component‑and‑connector architecture models and state‑machine extensions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MontiArcModelDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkSimulationSensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects simulation results from MathWorks Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SysMLModelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SysMLModelSensingComponent
]

instance MontiArcModelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MontiArcModelSensingComponent
]

instance SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationSensingComponent
]

// C10: Data
instance SysMLModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "XML/XMI representation of SysML requirement, functional, logical and product models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SysMLModelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized MontiArc component‑connector model with automaton specifications"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MontiArcModelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcToolEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation result datasets (time‑series, signals) produced by Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkToolEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling & execution platforms)
instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment (e.g., Cameo Systems Modeler) enabling processing of SysML models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance MontiArcToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL toolchain for component‑connector model analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance SimulinkToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation platform for executing behavioral models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance ACMEArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME ADL processor for architecture model analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance AADLArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL toolchain for real‑time embedded system architecture analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance CppCodeGenEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ code generation toolchain converting refined product models to source code"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

instance JavaCodeGenEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java code generation toolchain converting refined product models to Java implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ModelTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides traceability insights across MBSE layers (requirements, functional, logical, product)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RequirementsTraceabilityInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes behavioral models and delivers simulation result insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates executable code (C++ or Java) from refined models"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateCppCodeAction, GenerateJavaCodeAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance RequirementsTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into traceability links between requirements and downstream model elements"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into simulation output data and validity of behavioral models"
]

// C17: Actions
instance GenerateCppCodeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate C++ implementation code from logical/product models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateJavaCodeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate Java implementation code from logical/product models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models (artefacts leveraged by the DT)
instance RequirementsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML requirements model captured in block definition diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance FunctionalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML functional model defining system functions and interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance LogicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML logical model detailing logical components and connections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance ProductModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML product/technical model describing concrete hardware/software components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance ArchitectureModel_ACME : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME architecture model describing component composition and connectors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEArchitectureEnabler
]

instance ArchitectureModel_AADL : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL architecture model for real‑time embedded system specifications"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLArchitectureEnabler
]

instance ArchitectureModel_MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc component‑connector model with automaton extensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcToolEnabler
]

instance BehavioralStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state‑machine or MontiArc Automaton model capturing system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler, MontiArcToolEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model implementing analytical behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkToolEnabler
]
